title: 3 Ancient Egypt Facts That Sound Fake

segments.text: The pyramids were already ancient when Cleopatra was born.
And Egypt only gets stranger the closer you look.
Cleopatra lived closer in time to the moon landing than to the building of the pyramids.
The workers who built the pyramids were paid in bread and beer, and they were not slaves.
Ancient Egyptians invented toothpaste, paper, and a three hundred and sixty five day calendar.
And the Great Pyramid stayed the tallest building on Earth for almost four thousand years.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: The pyramids were ancient before Cleopatra was even born. History is wild. Follow for daily facts that sound fake but are real!
